name: agent-notify
description: Cross-platform notification sound & taskbar flash for AI coding agents. Plays alert sounds and visual notifications when the agent needs confirmation or completes tasks.
author: Miluer-tcq

evaluation.practicality: Solves a real pain point — users miss Claude's prompts while multitasking
evaluation.automation: One-command setup wizard, auto-detects OS and agent environment
evaluation.quality: Cross-platform scripts with jq/python3 fallback, configurable sounds and flash count
